eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Churchill; Clark; Douglas; Elko; Esmeralda; Eureka; Humboldt; Lander; Lincoln; Lyon; Mineral; Nye; Pershing; Storey; Washoe; White Pine; Carson City, NV; at 02:20 PM ON MAR 25, 2026 Effective until 03:20 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
This is a test of the Emergency Alert System, issued by the Nevada Office of Emergency Management. This is only a test.
Federal state and local officials use the Emergency Alert System to keep you informed in the event of an emergency or disaster through your local radio television and cable providers.
This test helps ensure that Emergency Alert System participants are able to provide critical information during an emergency.
This concludes this test of the Emergency Alert System.
